title: 有馬記念の後に・皇帝君臨

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race ends amid thunderous applause, and
Symboli Rudolf and Maruzensky congratulate one
another on a battle well fought.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reawakened to the thrill of racing, Symboli
Rudolf pledges to share her joy with every
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, at the press conference, she outlines her
dream as Emperor to the world. In this moment,
the Emperor is truly born.
